title: helenium squarrosum
intro: Helenium squarrosum, also known as American sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and a strong, pungent scent. The medicinal properties of Helenium squarrosum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of the plant are numerous, including its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Helenium squarrosum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
